query:
SELECT 
  c.title,
  COUNT(*) as total_aulas,
  SUM(CASE WHEN video_url IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as null_videos,
  SUM(CASE WHEN video_url = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as empty_videos,
  SUM(CASE WHEN video_url IS NOT NULL AND video_url != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_video
FROM lessons l
JOIN modules m ON l.module_id = m.id
JOIN courses c ON m.course_id = c.id
GROUP BY c.id, c.title;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user U12DfRhAFBW6sMR.root --database LDLtnU3Ggjm84uQbZLmZ7C --execute SELECT 
  c.title,
  COUNT(*) as total_aulas,
  SUM(CASE WHEN video_url IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as null_videos,
  SUM(CASE WHEN video_url = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as empty_videos,
  SUM(CASE WHEN video_url IS NOT NULL AND video_url != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_video
FROM lessons l
JOIN modules m ON l.module_id = m.id
JOIN courses c ON m.course_id = c.id
GROUP BY c.id, c.title;
